scripts.format: prettier --write "src/**/*.{ts,tsx,css}" "e2e/**/*.ts" "{README,DECISIONS,SESSIONS}.md" docs/DEVELOPMENT.md eslint.config.js playwright.config.ts vite.config.ts package.json .prettierrc.json .lintstagedrc.json .github/workflows/*.yml .github/dependabot.yml .devcontainer/devcontainer.json
scripts.format:check: prettier --check "src/**/*.{ts,tsx,css}" "e2e/**/*.ts" "{README,DECISIONS,SESSIONS}.md" docs/DEVELOPMENT.md eslint.config.js playwright.config.ts vite.config.ts package.json .prettierrc.json .lintstagedrc.json .github/workflows/*.yml .github/dependabot.yml .devcontainer/devcontainer.json
scripts.verify: npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm run tsc && npm run test:coverage && npm run build && npx playwright test --project=chromium
scripts.verify:unit: npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm run tsc && npm run test:coverage && npm run build
